title: Pale Oak Building Materials
description: This mod brings the pale oak building materials from Minecraft 1.21.4+ back to previous versions.
body:
### Introduction
This mod brings the pale oak building materials from Minecraft 1.21.4+ back to previous versions.
### Upgrade Compatibility
The building blocks in this mod use the **minecraft:** namespace. This means that after a world save containing these mod building blocks is upgraded to version 1.21.4 or above, all the mod building blocks will automatically convert into the corresponding vanilla building blocks.
